label: Catalog Service (products)

provisioning.label: Catalog Service
provisioning.help: Enable Commerce Services Connector + SaaS data export. https://experienceleague.adobe.com/en/docs/commerce-merchant-services/catalog-service

postNote: Catalog Service serves fast catalog data (PDP/PLP). Pair with Live Search for discovery; both ride the Catalog GraphQL endpoint via API Mesh.
